name: New Script Request
about: Suggest a new text transformation script

labels: new-script

---

## Script Name

The name for the new script (e.g., "Reverse Words").

## Description

What the script does.

## Example

**Input:**
```
example input here
```

**Expected Output:**
```
expected output here
```

## Category

Which category from `seo-data.json` this belongs to:
- [ ] Formatting
- [ ] Minification
- [ ] Encoding
- [ ] Hashing
- [ ] Conversion
- [ ] Text Case
- [ ] Text Manipulation
- [ ] Generation
- [ ] Extraction
- [ ] Developer Utilities

## Additional Context

Any edge cases, related scripts, or implementation notes.
